source: verify.py FAIL after T-173 AwarenessCache extraction.
title: T-173 left two tests poking removed PiAgent._awareness_snapshot_cache attribute
what_failed: T-173 moved the six _awareness_* attributes into AwarenessCache (agent/awareness_cache.py). test_awareness_atomic.py and test_provider_error_handling.py still set/read PiAgent._awareness_snapshot_cache directly, so they silently created a dead attribute and asserted None==''.
why_likely: T-173 updated the property but not the white-box tests that reached past it.
resolution: Rewrote test_awareness_atomic.py to exercise AwarenessCache directly; updated test_provider_error_handling.py to set/read agent._awareness_cache._cache. Both pass.
analysis: White-box tests that poke private attrs break on refactor. Prefer testing the public surface (the property) or the extracted unit directly.
